title: a Minacraft Cerber
description: modpack for the modded Minecraft server dedicated to VTuber CerberVT
body:
# Wan Wan fellow Modrinth explorer!

Welcome to the CerberVT's Minawan Modpack. a survival-enhancing pack made by and for the Minawan community. This modpack focuses on making Minecraft more enjoyable for builders who want to build larger builds and casual players who just want an improved vanilla experience. This modpack is about improving the quality of life when making larger building projects, making it smoother, and easier by adding mods like **Litematica**, **Builder's wands**, and more!

Whether making your dream megabase, creating a super detailed base, or just simply wanting to enjoy an enhanced vanilla experience with friends, this pack has everything, from better inventory management to building aid mods, as well as improved exploration mods like waystones. every mod in this pack is designed to improve the vanilla survival experience without straying to far from vanilla Minecraft

# Why Download this Modpack?

Simple yet amazing quality of life changes: easier and smoothing building and planning tools like **Litematica** and **Builder's wands** to help you build larger bases faster than ever before! Furthermore quality of life mods like Sodium, Phosphorus, and lithium

This is a cozy modpack with just the right amount of mods that enhance vanilla without making things to complex

Lastly for explorers and people who want to get to their far away bases quicker, we have a mod for that! **Waystones** add waystones to the game that cost 1 experience level to use, as well as a late game item called the wormhole that acts like a portable waystone.

Have fun, and enjoy Minecraft the way the CerberVT's community likes it

description written by MiyaFoxWan and CrafterCheese
